Name: CutsceneGparamTimeParam
Description: Determines GPARAM timezone parameters during a cutscene.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Timezone: Morning
Fields.Description: Morning (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)

Fields.Name: Timezone: Noon
Fields.Description: Day A (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)

Fields.Name: Timezone: Afternoon
Fields.Description: Noon-B (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)

Fields.Name: Timezone: Evening
Fields.Description: Evening (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)

Fields.Name: Timezone: Night
Fields.Description: Night (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)

Fields.Name: Timezone: Midnight A
Fields.Description: Midnight A (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)

Fields.Name: Timezone: Midnight B
Fields.Description: Midnight B (Refer to the cutscene time conversion setting sheet for the conversion time)
